3149660.name: Jenny's Adventures
3149660.description:
Jenny's Adventure is a 2D platformer where you guide Jenny, a cat, through an interconnected world of biomes. Use abilities like wall jumps and sprints while managing stamina to explore and collect flowers. Focused on platforming and discovery, it offers a relaxing, combat-free experience.

Features

Exploration: With a heavy emphasis on exploration and discovery, Jenny's Adventures is a metroidvania filled with unlockable abilities and secrets. Find your way to the summit using your curiosity as the guide.

It features an interconnected world with different biomes. Uncover a world with areas like forests and beaches. Use your skills to tackle several platforming puzzles to find the path to an area.

Jumping: Jenny's Adventures uses a slightly different approach to jumping which is commonly seen in traditional platformers. Player needs to hold the jump button and then release it. If the player releases in a specific window, it results in a 'perfect jump' which increases the jump height.

Game also features a stamina system. Some abilities like sprinting consumes stamina which can be refilled by collecting flowers or perfect jumps.
